case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. STEVE CASTRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, STEVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE $675.00 RENT, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $540.00 COSTS, $16,279.20 HOLDOVER CHARGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,744.20, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
